description: Complete attachment management component that combines TmFileDropZone with a list of existing attachments loaded via IFileAttachmentProvider. Supports download, delete, and upload with progress indication.

parameters.name: Provider
parameters.description: Data provider for loading, downloading, deleting, and uploading attachments.

parameters.name: EntityId
parameters.description: Entity ID used to load and upload attachments.

parameters.name: Disabled
parameters.description: When true, upload and delete controls are disabled.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS class for the root element.

parameters.name: OnDeleted
parameters.description: Fires when an attachment is deleted.
